response.justification: The candidate lacks the mandatory C++ development experience on Windows systems (core requirement) and does not demonstrate domain expertise in fixed income, investment banking, or capital markets. While strong in full-stack development (JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, Node.js) and general software engineering, the resume shows no relevant work in financial systems or Windows C++ environments.
strengths: Strong full-stack development skills in multiple languages (JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, Node.js)
Proven ability to work in agile teams with modern practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
Diverse industry exposure across web, mobile, embedded, and data-driven domains
concerns: No demonstrated experience with C++ on Windows platform (mandatory requirement)
No domain expertise in fixed income, investment banking, or capital markets
